chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S- 1149 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.6861/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6862/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of Bail Application 27.11.2025 Mr.Manzoor Hussain Mahessar, Advocate along with Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this bail application, applicant/accused, namely Bashir Ahmed S/o Muhammad Yousif, Narejo, seeks protective bail in Crime No.01 of 2022 registered at Police Station, Baradi Jatoi, District Khairpur Mirs for offence under Sections 302, 324, 404, 337-H, 148, 149 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant/accused is innocent and he has falsely been implicated in this case by the complainant with mala fide intentions and ulterior motives; that there is inordinate and unexplained delay of about six days in lodgment of the FIR, for which no plausible explanation has been furnished by the complainant; that the applicant/accused is ready to surrender before the court Sessions Court concerned along with an application u/s 498 Cr.P.C but apprehends his arrest at the hands of police as the court concerned is cordoned off by the police. Without touching the merits or demerits of the case, protective bail for a period of ten days is granted to applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of NBWs, if any, shall remain suspended for the aforesaid period.

Without touching the merits or demerits of the case, protective bail for a period of ten days is granted to applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of NBWs, if any, shall remain suspended for the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case the applicant/accused failed to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI/PS
